description: An SSM Parameter Store parameter containing configuration data.

ARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the parameter.

LastModifiedDate.description: Date the parameter was last changed or updated.

DataType.description: The data type of the parameter.

Selector.description: Either the version number or the label used to retrieve the parameter value.

SourceResult.description: The raw result or response from the source.

title: Parameter
